response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the performer as Kobo Kanaeru. 2. Detected the song title from the on-screen text: 'あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないんです。'. 3. Searched for this song title and artist/featured artist (Kanon Sakura) to find official lyrics, but results were inconclusive as the song appears to be original to the event. 4. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the video. 5. Mapped the scenes: one vocal performance (00:00-01:48) and one chat segment (01:48-05:01).
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber, Kobo Kanaeru, performing an acoustic guitar song, 'Anata no koto ga suki da nante ienai n desu.', as part of her 3D birthday stream celebration, followed by chatting segments.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru performs an acoustic song titled 'Anata no koto ga suki da nante ienai n desu.' featuring Kanon Sakura while playing guitar. The stage is decorated with clouds and stars.
scenes.song_title: あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないんです。
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
言えるかな
指をひっくり返すくらいの
粋なセリフは
言えそうにないな

どうしてもこの気持ちは
抑えられそうにはないんだ
あなたと出会ったあの日から
ずっと気持ちは変わらない
けど

あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないんです
この気持ち伝わるかな
こっち足だってから回り
何も言えずまたさよなら
あなたのことが好きすぎて
たまらないんです
明日こそは言いたいな
あなたも僕に同じように
恋してたらなんて考えてる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Could I say it?
I can't seem to say
anything chic enough
to flip my fingers over.

I can't seem to suppress
this feeling no matter what.
From the day I met you,
my feelings haven't changed at all.
But...

I can't say that I like you.
Will these feelings reach you?
My feet keep going in circles,
I can't say anything and we say goodbye again.
I like you so much
that I can't stand it.
I want to say it tomorrow.
I wonder if you're thinking
that you're in love with me too, in the same way.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru stops singing, puts down the guitar, and chats with the audience, celebrating her 3D birthday stream.
